[Info] g3ts-package/root-pnpm package.json root pnpm policy is present
  The root package manifest keeps both `pnpm.overrides` and `pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies`.
[Info] g3ts-package/local-banned-dependencies package.json Syncpack bans forbidden package dependencies
  `package.json` lists `syncpack`, runs `syncpack lint` fail-closed, and `.syncpackrc` bans forbidden package deps through Syncpack: `axios`, `lodash`, `moment`, `uuid`, `nanoid`, `express`, `classnames`, `winston`, `pino`, `request`, `got`, `superagent`, `node-fetch`, `isomorphic-fetch`, `underscore`, `request-promise`, `cross-fetch`, `xregexp`, `regexp-tree`.

[Error] g3ts-package/validate-script-present package.json validate script is missing

[Error] g3ts-package/root-pnpm package.json root pnpm policy is incomplete
  The root package manifest must declare pnpm.overrides and pnpm.onlyBuiltDependencies.
[Error] g3ts-package/local-banned-dependencies package.json Syncpack package policy validator is not installed and wired
  `package.json` does not list `syncpack` in dependencies or devDependencies and does not run `syncpack lint` in any root script. Add `syncpack` and wire `syncpack lint` so dependency policy is enforced by Syncpack instead of G3TS scanning package manifests.
[Error] g3ts-package/local-banned-dependencies .syncpackrc Syncpack does not ban forbidden package dependencies
  `.syncpackrc` is missing, so the package family cannot prove Syncpack bans forbidden package deps for `package.json`. Add a parseable `.syncpackrc` with exact `source` entries and canonical `isBanned: true` versionGroups for `axios`, `lodash`, `moment`, `uuid`, `nanoid`, `express`, `classnames`, `winston`, `pino`, `request`, `got`, `superagent`, `node-fetch`, `isomorphic-fetch`, `underscore`, `request-promise`, `cross-fetch`, `xregexp`, `regexp-tree`.
